series_title: Cultural/Sports/State Historical Facility Project Grant Applications and Related Documents
series_description: All materials submitted for assessment or in satisfaction of approval conditions / preparation for legal agreements.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until the project is approved, project work is complete, and the disbursement of approved funds is complete and audited ; Paper: Retain until the project is approved, project work is complete, and the disbursement of approved funds is complete and audited

series_title: Contractually Reqd Submissions Related to Cultural/Sports/State Historical Facility Improvements
series_description: All materials submitted in response to obligations in the legal agreements related to the completion of approved capital improvements, including fundraising documentation related to the capital project.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until the project is approved, project work is complete, and the disbursement of approved funds is complete and audited ; Paper: Retain until the project is approved, project work is complete, and the disbursement of approved funds is complete and audited

series_title: Contractually Reqd Submissions Rel. to Coop. Use or Lease of Cultural/Sports/State Hist. Facilities
series_description: All materials submitted in response to obligations in the legal agreements related to the ongoing use of the facility, including fundraising documentation related to ongoing operations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 1 year after legal agreements expire or are terminated ; Paper: Retain for 1 year after legal agreements expire or are terminated
